name: image
description: Image as the slide's anchor, with optional text alongside.
purpose: Use when a visual carries meaning on its own. Modifiers control how the image fills the slide: `full` for edge-to-edge, `contain` for letterboxed, `museum` for a matted/framed treatment.

image.description: Marp background image syntax: `![bg](path)` or `![bg right](path)`.

heading.description: Optional heading in the text slot.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: image -->

![bg right](path/to/image.jpg)

## Optional heading.

Optional caption sentence beside the image.
